_comment: snagateway example config. Each SNA Server (PU) gets a connection; each LU on that PU maps to a TN3270 target.

llc2._comment: Gateway's own 802.2 link. local_sap 0x04 is the conventional SNA SAP.

connections.name: SNASERVER1
connections._comment: remote_mac is the NT4 SNA Server box's NIC. Define a matching 802.2 host connection in SNA Manager pointing at THIS gateway's MAC.
